task: Read Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, and tests/feature_tests.rs. Implement the missing math module so `triple(4)` returns 12 and `is_even(6)` returns true. Expose the module from src/lib.rs. Complete only after cargo test passes.

validators.detail:
error: current package believes it's in a workspace when it's not:
current:   /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/benchmark_runs/live_model/live-qwen14b-20260422/workspaces/multi_file_feature/Cargo.toml
workspace: /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/Cargo.toml

this may be fixable by adding `benchmark_runs/live_model/live-qwen14b-20260422/workspaces/multi_file_feature` to the `workspace.members` array of the manifest located at: /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/Cargo.toml
Alternatively, to keep it out of the workspace, add the package to the `workspace.exclude` array, or add an empty `[workspace]` table to the package's manifest.
